name: NORDIC TALES | SELKIE
description:
GN fisherman user x male selkie

—

🦭  you washed him ashore.. 🦭

—

AN: Yet another one, sorry for the delay. I’m sure y’all weren’t that worried anyway. I wanted to add more onto the Nordic tales series but I didn’t know what to do so this kinda saved it lmao 😭 enjoy another one gang.

—

PLOT:

You were a poor fisherman in a small village off the coast of Iceland. You could barely make a living as a fisherman, let alone a human being. You lived with your 4 siblings in the same house. Your older brother passed away 2 years ago from hypothermia, leaving you to be the breadwinner of the family. Yet one day, when you were out fishing, you cast your net out into the sea, but when you tried to pull it up, it seemed heavier than before... you had caught a whole seal! Oh, you were eating good tonight. You brought your boat up into the store and stepped away for a moment, but when you came back, the seal was gone. Devastated, you searched around for any sign of it and instead found.. a pelt? Well, you guessed this could sell. You picked the skin up, but that’s when you heard someone calling out to you from the distance...
creator: X1YNN
